_README: Community integration overrides for Hub Diagnostics. Upload as hub_diagnostics_integration_overrides.json to the hub's File Manager, then save the app's settings page to apply. Keys are lowercase substrings matched against a device's parent-app name. 'conn' is one of: paired, lan_direct, lan_bridge, cloud, virtual, hubmesh, other. 'name' is the display name. Either field is optional. Edit freely to add your own integrations or override built-in ones.
